policy_note: Default policy is 90% line coverage per source file. Files listed below carry debt baselines that MUST only ratchet upward toward 90%, never down. Run `make larql-lql-coverage-summary` to refresh; numbers are floored from the measured value to leave noise headroom. Session 2 (2026-06-05/06): added ~230 targeted tests across tests/cov_{mutation,query,lifecycle,executor_core,parser_lexer}_synthetic.rs + cov_tier_a*.rs + cov_remote_mockito.rs + cov_patch_lifecycle_synthetic.rs; TOTAL 89.21% -> 93.91%; 20 files cleared 90% and were removed from this list. The 7 remaining debt files are all genuinely hard: they require a real HuggingFace model directory (a Backend::Weight session — extract.rs, lifecycle/compile/into_model.rs, lifecycle/use_cmd.rs USE MODEL success, query/infer.rs dense-inference arm, executor/backend.rs Weight arms, parts of introspection.rs) or are an interactive REPL (repl.rs). These are reachable only with a hand-built safetensors fixture in larql-inference test_utils (out of scope here) or via in-crate #[cfg(test)] unit tests that — confirmed this session — do not move the integration-link coverage summary.
